I'll start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me reason through the fix:

**What needs to change:**

1. The `title` and `description` props on `<Modal>` need to move to a `<ModalHeader>` child component.
2. I need to add `ModalHeader` to the import from `@patternfly/react-core`.
3. The `title` prop becomes `title={title}` on `<ModalHeader>`, and `description` becomes `description={description}` on `<ModalHeader>`.
4. `<ModalHeader>` should be placed as a child of `<Modal>`, before the existing children.

**What stays the same:**
- `variant`, `isOpen`, `aria-label`, `aria-describedby`, `onClose` all stay on `<Modal>`.
- The `AppManagePoliciesModalBody` child stays as-is.
- The `title` and `description` variables are still used (just passed to `ModalHeader` instead), so no dead code to clean up.

**No `ModalBody` or `ModalFooter` needed** — the existing children are not wrapped in deprecated `ModalBoxBody`/etc. The `AppManagePoliciesModalBody` is a custom component, not a PF deprecated component.

Let me apply the fix:

arguments.after:
<Modal
      variant={ModalVariant.large}
      isOpen={isOpen}
      aria-label="Manage policy modal"
      aria-describedby="manage-policy-modal"
      onClose={close}
    >
      <ModalHeader title={title} description={description} />
      <AppManagePoliciesModalBody
arguments.before:
<Modal
      title={title}
      description={description}
      variant={ModalVariant.large}
      isOpen={isOpen}
      aria-label="Manage policy modal"
      aria-describedby="manage-policy-modal"
      onClose={close}
    >
      <AppManagePoliciesModalBody
